name: News / Blog
description: Production-grade news/blog module with article workflow (draft/published), SEO fields, taxonomy (categories/tags), cover images, public listing + detail pages, RSS, JSON-LD, and sitemap-ready routing for AI search discoverability.

changes: Complete release package — upload full news_blog_module_v0.0.5.zip to the repository before clients update.
Fix: removed unused __init__.py blueprint import that caused plugin import failure (public_bp no longer imported at module import time).
Improved compatibility with the new get_public_blueprint() loading pattern used by the website module.
Smart sitemap signposting: declares public sitemap endpoints for aggregation into the website module sitemap index.
Adds/updates public section discovery metadata for /llms.txt and human/AI navigation (public_sections + public_sitemaps).
Admin dashboard with KPIs and single-endpoint action switching for CRUD (articles, categories, tags).
Draft/published workflow with automatic published_at handling.
SEO-friendly slugs with uniqueness enforcement and safe input coercion.
Taxonomy support: categories (with optional primary category) and tags (get-or-create, de-duplication, race-safe insert fallback).
Cover image upload fields (path + alt text) for accessibility and SEO.
Public routes: index + article detail (slug-based), with keyword search support (q/keyword).
Structured data support (JSON-LD NewsArticle) and social metadata hooks (Open Graph/Twitter blocks).
Schema + installer: idempotent migrations, indexes, and FK constraints with ON DELETE CASCADE for join tables.
